author: jethrojones
description: View, search, sort, and edit CSV files in Obsidian, with a built-in log viewer for filtering and inspecting .log files. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Jethro Jones
manifest.description: View CSV, VTT, Log, SRT, and more with purpose-built file views.
manifest.name: File Viewer

name: File Viewer

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed

- Updated the plugin description to remove the word Obsidian, matching community plugin directory guidance.
- Bumped release metadata to 1.4.2 so the downloadable manifest includes the corrected description.

## Verification

- Obsidian ESLint reviewer checks pass.
- Production build passes.
- Unit tests pass: 18 tests across 1 test file.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed

- Renamed the plugin to File Viewer to better reflect support beyond CSV and log files.
- Updated the community plugin README opening to clearly say: File Viewer (view CSV, VTT, Log, SRT, and more).
- Updated the plugin manifest and package description to say it views CSV, VTT, Log, SRT, and more directly in Obsidian.

## Verification

- Obsidian ESLint reviewer checks pass.
- Production build passes.
- Unit tests pass: 18 tests across 1 test file.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed

- Added transcript viewing support for .vtt and .srt files.
- Added separate settings toggles for VTT and SRT transcript viewers.
- Added searchable transcript cue display with timestamps and multiline caption support.

## Verification

- Obsidian ESLint reviewer checks pass.
- Production build passes.
- Unit tests pass: 18 tests across 1 test file.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's changed

This release brings the plugin in line with Obsidian's updated community plugin review checks.

- Added Obsidian reviewer linting and a full `npm run verify` command.
- Added pre-commit and pre-push hooks that run lint, build, and tests before publishing changes.
- Fixed Obsidian review warnings for popout-window compatibility, unused parameters, settings loading, CSS specificity, and deprecated build dependencies.
- Added a GitHub release workflow that uploads `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` with artifact attestations.
- Fixed clean-install behavior for npm and strict pnpm installs.

## Verification

- Obsidian ESLint reviewer checks pass.
- Production build passes.
- Unit tests pass: 16 tests across 1 test file.
- Release assets include GitHub artifact attestations.

releases.author: jethrojones
releases.description:
Adds log file viewing alongside the CSV table viewer.

- Open .log files with line numbers, log level coloring, timestamp highlighting, search, and level filters.
- Add plugin settings to enable or disable CSV and log file viewers separately.
- Update plugin metadata and documentation for CSV and log viewing.

Validation: npm test; npm run build.

releases.author: jethrojones
releases.description: Address Obsidian review feedback: remove flagged async/no-op patterns, avoid direct style assignment, document privacy/disclosure details, and update dev dependencies.

releases.author: jethrojones
releases.description:
## Bug Fixes

- **Fix: quoted field whitespace preserved** — Fields like `"  hello  "` now correctly retain their spaces instead of being trimmed (RFC 4180 compliance)
- **Fix: edit + sort data corruption** — Editing cells while the table is sorted now correctly writes to the right row, even when rows have identical values
- **Fix: contenteditable compatibility** — Switched from `plaintext-only` (unsupported in older Electron) to `true` with paste sanitization for broad Obsidian version support

## Changes

- Extracted inline CSS to `styles.css` for easier theme overrides
- Bumped `minAppVersion` to `1.4.0` to reflect actual compatibility
- Synced `versions.json`, `manifest.json`, and `package.json` versions
- Removed debug `console.log` statements

releases.author: jethrojones
releases.description: Fix description to end with period for Obsidian community plugin validation.

releases.author: jethrojones
releases.description: Fix plugin description to comply with Obsidian community plugin guidelines (remove 'Obsidian' from description).

releases.author: jethrojones
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Inline Editing** — Toggle edit mode to modify cells directly in the table
  - Click the Edit button in the toolbar to enable
  - Changes auto-save when you click away
  - Tab/Shift+Tab to navigate between cells, Escape to deselect
  - Sorting is disabled during edit mode to preserve data integrity

releases.author: jethrojones
releases.description:
Initial release of CSV Viewer for Obsidian.

- View CSV files as formatted, interactive tables
- Click-to-sort columns with smart numeric detection
- Real-time search and filter with match highlighting
- Theme-aware styling (light and dark mode)
- Responsive layout with sticky headers
